conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (GET + custom RSS/XML decode via encoding/xml — the engine's declarative read path only decodes JSON response bodies, connectorgen validate/engine/read.go has no XML support); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/rss/hooks_test.go and internal/connectors/paritytest/rss/parity_test.go
